title: 日本ダービーの後に・その瞳には何が

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither Narita Taishin nor Winning Ticket
manage to conquer the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite having her dream crushed, Winning
Ticket is still looking forward to the next race,
and Narita Taishin is left deeply impressed by
such determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin reaffirms her dedication to keep
pushing on, so she can seize victory at the final
race of the Triple Crown tour—the Kikuka Sho.
